parts.text:
Subject: Thinking of you / Our upcoming Senate race

Hi Uncle [Name],

I hope you’re doing well and enjoying your retirement. I was thinking about our last conversation and how much I’ve always respected your perspective on duty and service. Your time in the [Branch of Military] really shaped how I view what it means to show up for your community and your country.

I’m writing because I’ve been thinking a lot about the upcoming Senate race. I know we haven’t always seen eye-to-eye on every candidate, but I wanted to share why I’m actually planning to vote for [Candidate Name] this year—and why I think you might find some common ground with them, too.

I know you’ve been a lifelong Republican, and I respect that loyalty. However, looking at the two candidates this time around, I truly believe [Candidate Name] is the one who will look out for people like you. Here are a few things that really stood out to me:

**1. A Real Commitment to Veterans:** 
One of the biggest reasons I’m supporting [Candidate Name] is their track record on veteran affairs. They have been vocal about expanding the VA’s budget to reduce wait times and ensuring that the PACT Act remains fully funded. I know how much you value a promise kept, and [Candidate Name] has made it clear that "thank you for your service" should be backed by the best healthcare and benefits possible.

**2. Protecting Social Security and Medicare:**
You worked hard for decades, and you earned your retirement. There’s been a lot of talk lately about "reforming" or cutting these programs to balance the budget. [Candidate Name] has been firm that Social Security and Medicare are non-negotiable. They view it as a contract between the government and its citizens—one that shouldn't be broken just because the political winds change.

**3. Supporting the "Little Guy" and Local Industry:**
I know you’ve always valued hard work and keeping our economy strong. [Candidate Name] is focused on bringing manufacturing back to our state and investing in our local infrastructure. They aren't interested in just helping the biggest corporations; they want to make sure small business owners and retirees in towns like ours aren’t being squeezed by rising costs.

**4. Respect for Institutions:**
As someone who spent a career in the military, I know you value stability and the rule of law. [Candidate Name] is a moderate who believes in reaching across the aisle to actually get things done rather than just creating noise on the news. They have a deep respect for our democratic institutions and the Constitution—values I know you’ve literally put your life on the line to defend.

I’m not asking you to change your entire political identity, but I truly believe that in this specific race, [Candidate Name] is the better choice for your interests and for the stability of our state. 

I’d love to grab a coffee or a beer next time I’m in town and hear your thoughts—I always value your take on things. 

Best to Aunt [Name] and the rest of the family!

Best,

[Your Name]
